currentState: Pressed cooperation. The captain resists until Millhaven is named, then yields authority in the specific areas where Sylvanas has experience he does not.
powerDynamic: The captain owns local jurisdiction. Sylvanas owns the harder truth and the force of precedent. Once he accepts that, their interaction becomes local logistics feeding specialist control.

physicalDynamics.pattern: They meet in the square as two kinds of authority trying to hold the same village together; Sylvanas uses stillness and observation while the captain braces himself at the well.

nameUsage.sylvanasCallsCaptain: No title-softening, only direct consequence and observation.
nameUsage.captainCallsSylvanas: Treats her first as an armed outsider, then as the person whose Millhaven experience he cannot argue away.

history.event: Sylvanas wins entry to the village by forcing the captain to imagine his own square after it becomes Millhaven.

trajectory: Skeptical local resistance -> reluctant operational cooperation.
